title: CDISC with R
description: A free, self-paced, hands-on course on CDISC clinical data standards in R: building SDTM domains, ADaM datasets, define-XML, tables, listings and figures, and Dataset-JSON from scratch using a simulated Phase III trial (GLPX-001). All data is synthetic.

creators.name: Suleman, Sufyan
creators.affiliation: Department of Biomedicine, Faculty of Health, Aarhus University, Denmark
